purpose: Known data-provenance anomalies in founder_alpha.fa_window_capture. Append-only tables cannot be corrected, so anomalies are DOCUMENTED for analysis-time exclusion instead.

anomalies.cause: Operator error: a Dockerfile build-context simulation was run against PRODUCTION instead of with CAPTURE_DRY_RUN=true, so two workers wrote concurrently for ~35s.

impact.data_validity: Rows are GENUINE book snapshots with distinct timestamps - not corrupt and not exact duplicates. The defect is DENSITY: this 50s span was sampled at roughly 2x the specified 5s cadence.
impact.seals_affected: NONE - 4 seals, 4 unique. UNIQUE(model_id,model_version,window_id) + ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING prevented any duplicate seal.

anomalies.analysis_guidance: Exclude this span from cadence/uptime/gap statistics (v_fa_capture_health uptime_pct_of_expected is inflated for 2026-07-23). Forecast, seal and settlement analysis are UNAFFECTED.
anomalies.prevention: Any future non-production worker run MUST pass --dry-run. Only one worker may write at a time; this is why railway.json pins numReplicas=1.
